chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1103 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 29.10.2025 Mr. Gulshan Ahmed Shujrah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- AAG submits that for the appointment on the disable quota, DRC was called and their interview was also held, but the present petitioner was remained absent. Under the circumstances, instant petition is disposed of with directions to the Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki, to consider the case of petitioner in next coming DRC and decide the case of petitioner in accordance with law, if law prevails. Accordingly instant petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
